assumptions.text: Client will provide timely access to relevant documentation, data, and key stakeholders for interviews and workshops.
Engagement scope is based on the information provided during initial discussions. Material changes to scope may require a separate change order.
Engagement follows a co-creative model with regular check-ins. Client designates a single point of contact for coordination and decision escalation.
Collaboration is primarily remote/online with optional on-site sessions as agreed. Deliverables are provided in digital format (PDF, PPTX) unless otherwise specified.
All deliverables remain draft until client sign-off at each phase gate. Final versions incorporate one round of client feedback per deliverable.

disclaimers.text: All recommendations and analyses are based on information provided by the client and publicly available data. Strategic Popoltastic does not guarantee specific business outcomes.
All engagement materials, findings, and deliverables are treated as strictly confidential. Strategic Popoltastic will not disclose client information to third parties without written consent.

principles.name: Co-creatie
principles.description: This is a co-creation process. We work together through regular check-ins to ensure alignment and ownership of the strategic direction.

principles.name: Kwaliteit
principles.description: We hold ourselves to top-tier strategy advisory quality standards — the same rigor you would expect from Bain, BCG, or McKinsey, delivered with the agility of a focused boutique.

principles.name: Prestatie-Indicator
principles.description: We believe in earned trust. Payment can be linked to client satisfaction: if dissatisfied, 85% is paid for work completed, with 15% retained as a performance-linked discount.

principles.name: Flexibel & Iteratief
principles.description: Our approach is structured but flexible. Primarily online collaboration with optional on-site sessions. We adapt to your pace and priorities.

whyStrategyAudit.title: Waarom helpt deze Strategy Audit?

statistics.growth: Coherent companies are 3x more likely to report above-average growth (47% vs 15%)
statistics.profit: Coherent companies are 2x more likely to report above-average profit (48% vs 22%)
statistics.source: Strategy& / 'Deals That Win' by J. Neely, John Juliens, and Joerg Krings (strategy + business, July 2015)

benefits: Clarifies the real market you operate in
